final_answer:
It doesn’t have the same code because Gold Chain is a **Cosmos + CometBFT custom stack**, not a Besu/Fabric permissioning stack, and `mint` logic is separate from validator-admission logic.

Why this matters: even if a Cosmos mint system is present, it controls inflation/rewards, not who can approve new validators; that approval path is in your validator/stake admission code.

On deletion: I did **not** delete any code in this discussion; this has been explanation-only.

What should be done next:
1. Do a read-only check to confirm exactly whether `x/mint` is wired in `app` and what it currently controls.
2. Separately define validator admission as multisig/governance (`k-of-n`) if you want to remove single-wallet control.
